'''鈭歠-dh-ch''' ('''fadhacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wed|wed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wed|wed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-dh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| fadhacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fadhachithi|fadhachithi]] || [[word:fadhachiji|fadhachiji]] || [[word:fadhachishi|fadhachishi]] || [[word:fadhachi|fadhachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhachuthuth|fadhachuthuth]] || [[word:fadhachujuj|fadhachujuj]] || [[word:fadhachushush|fadhachushush]] || [[word:fadhach|fadhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhachuthu|fadhachuthu]] || [[word:fadhachuju|fadhachuju]] || [[word:fadhachushu|fadhachushu]] || [[word:fadhachu|fadhachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhachufuth|fadhachufuth]] || [[word:fadhachufuj|fadhachufuj]] || [[word:fadhachufush|fadhachufush]] || [[word:fadhachuf|fadhachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fadhachethe|fadhachethe]] || [[word:fadhacheje|fadhacheje]] || [[word:fadhacheshe|fadhacheshe]] || [[word:fadhache|fadhache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhachothoth|fadhachothoth]] || [[word:fadhachojoj|fadhachojoj]] || [[word:fadhachoshosh|fadhachoshosh]] || [[word:fadhach|fadhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhachotho|fadhachotho]] || [[word:fadhachojo|fadhachojo]] || [[word:fadhachosho|fadhachosho]] || [[word:fadhacho|fadhacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhachofoth|fadhachofoth]] || [[word:fadhachofoj|fadhachofoj]] || [[word:fadhachofosh|fadhachofosh]] || [[word:fadhachof|fadhachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fadhach忙th忙|fadhach忙th忙]] || [[word:fadhach忙j忙|fadhach忙j忙]] || [[word:fadhach忙sh忙|fadhach忙sh忙]] || [[word:fadhach忙|fadhach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhachathath|fadhachathath]] || [[word:fadhachajaj|fadhachajaj]] || [[word:fadhachashash|fadhachashash]] || [[word:fadhach|fadhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhachatha|fadhachatha]] || [[word:fadhachaja|fadhachaja]] || [[word:fadhachasha|fadhachasha]] || [[word:fadhacha|fadhacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhachafath|fadhachafath]] || [[word:fadhachafaj|fadhachafaj]] || [[word:fadhachafash|fadhachafash]] || [[word:fadhachaf|fadhachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fadhachasha|fadhachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofadhachasha|gofadhachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifadhachasha|gokifadhachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fadhachn眉sha|fadhachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofadhachnkn眉sha|gofadhachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifadhachn眉sha|gokifadhachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fadhachsh毛sha|fadhachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofadhachnksh毛sha|gofadhachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifadhachsh毛sha|gokifadhachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fadhachrosha|fadhachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofadhachnkrosha|gofadhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifadhachrosha|gokifadhachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fadhachmusha|fadhachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofadhachnkmusha|gofadhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifadhachmusha|gokifadhachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fadhachsherasha|fadhachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofadhachnksherasha|gofadhachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifadhachsherasha|gokifadhachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fadhachngasha|fadhachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofadhachnkngasha|gofadhachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifadhachngasha|gokifadhachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fadhachyasha|fadhachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofadhachnkyasha|gofadhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifadhachyasha|gokifadhachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fadhachyamasha|fadhachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofadhachnkyamasha|gofadhachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifadhachyamasha|gokifadhachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fadhachn眉sh毛sha|fadhachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofadhachnkn眉sh毛sha|gofadhachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifadhachn眉sh毛sha|gokifadhachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fadhachn眉rosha|fadhachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofadhachnkn眉rosha|gofadhachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifadhachn眉rosha|gokifadhachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fadhachn眉musha|fadhachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofadhachnkn眉musha|gofadhachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifadhachn眉musha|gokifadhachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fadhachsh毛n眉sha|fadhachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofadhachnksh毛n眉sha|gofadhachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifadhachsh毛n眉sha|gokifadhachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fadhachsh毛rosha|fadhachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofadhachnksh毛rosha|gofadhachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifadhachsh毛rosha|gokifadhachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fadhachsh毛musha|fadhachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofadhachnksh毛musha|gofadhachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifadhachsh毛musha|gokifadhachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fadhachron眉sha|fadhachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofadhachnkron眉sha|gofadhachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifadhachron眉sha|gokifadhachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fadhachrosh毛sha|fadhachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofadhachnkrosh毛sha|gofadhachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifadhachrosh毛sha|gokifadhachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fadhachromusha|fadhachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofadhachnkromusha|gofadhachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifadhachromusha|gokifadhachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fadhachmun眉sha|fadhachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofadhachnkmun眉sha|gofadhachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifadhachmun眉sha|gokifadhachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fadhachmush毛sha|fadhachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofadhachnkmush毛sha|gofadhachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifadhachmush毛sha|gokifadhachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fadhachmurosha|fadhachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofadhachnkmurosha|gofadhachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifadhachmurosha|gokifadhachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fadhach|fadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:f忙dh忙ch|f忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofadhach|hofadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hof忙dh忙ch|hof忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofadhach|hohofadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohof忙dh忙ch|hohof忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉fadhach|n眉fadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉f忙dh忙ch|n眉f忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉fadhach|n眉n眉fadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉f忙dh忙ch|n眉n眉f忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂fadhach|n茂fadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂f忙dh忙ch|n茂f忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂fadhach|n茂n茂fadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂f忙dh忙ch|n茂n茂f忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufadhach|lufadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luf忙dh忙ch|luf忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufadhach|lulufadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluf忙dh忙ch|luluf忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifadhach|lifadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lif忙dh忙ch|lif忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifadhach|lilifadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilif忙dh忙ch|lilif忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofadhach|kofadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kof忙dh忙ch|kof忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofadhach|kokofadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokof忙dh忙ch|kokof忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefadhach|kefadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kef忙dh忙ch|kef忙dh忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefadhach|kekefadhach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekef忙dh忙ch|kekef忙dh忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
